title: elatostema radicans var. grande
intro: Elatostema radicans var. grande, also known as the 'Creeping False Daisy', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the nettle family (Urticaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elatostema radicans var. grande include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
